reviews.review_title: Best gorilla tag Fnaf game ever
reviews.review_description: Has the best idea in the world
This game is chud and romantic
The owner of the game demoted a great staff and ignores me and my friend all the time and bullies us.

developer_response.body: This staff member was demoted due to him using both hate and inappropriate speech to another member. If anything, demoting him would be better for the community. Also, if I do ignore you i'm not trying to there's just multiple people trying to talk to me and i'm most likely busy doing something else. I can also assure you I do not bully anyone in the community. I want a good and strong community the last thing I would let my staff team do or myself do is bully you, your friends, or anyone that has played this game.
I'm not giving random people I just met mod. Plus, you threaten to mod the game why would i give you staff i have no reason too? If anything I have reasons to ban you.
